set_value.name: $XMP.Json
set_value.exact: '{"v":1,"type":"spawn","seq":0,"ts":' + player.age + ',"objectId":"' + player.entity.id + '"' + ',"shipType":"' + player.entity.macro.name + '"' + ',"owner":"' + player.name + '"' + ',"maxHull":' + player.entity.hullmax + ',"maxShield":' + player.entity.shieldmax + '}'

debug_text.text: '[XMultiplayer][Arena] entered Arena sector: joined session and announced spawn'
'[XMultiplayer][Arena] left Arena sector: despawned and left session'

set_value.name: $XMP.Json
set_value.exact: '{"v":1,"type":"fire_event","seq":0,"ts":' + player.age + ',"sourceId":"' + player.entity.id + '"' + ',"weapon":"' + event.param + '"' + ',"origin":{"x":' + player.entity.position.x + ',"y":' + player.entity.position.y + ',"z":' + player.entity.position.z + '}' + ',"direction":{"x":' + event.param2.x + ',"y":' + event.param2.y + ',"z":' + event.param2.z + '}' + '}'
